prompt: Write a 10-slide LinkedIn carousel script targeting IP boutique law firm partners (2-25 attorneys) for openpatent.ai. Each slide ≤45 words. Slide 1: hook ('Your $400/hr intake is a $149 self-serve problem'). Slide 2: pain (3 hrs/week of junior-associate triage). Slide 3: the 6-layer cryptographic disclosure (SHA-3/512, HMAC, Ed25519, Bitcoin OTS, C2PA, hash-chained audit). Slide 4: the 5-tier ladder ($29/$149/$999/$2499/$4999). Slide 5: sovereign custody (your client's hash, your client's keys). Slide 6: jurisdictional coverage (10+ frameworks, US 35 USC 102 + EU eIDAS + WIPO 2022). Slide 7: attorney-graded prior-art in 90 seconds. Slide 8: case study (9-attorney Chicago firm, 3 hrs/week freed, $182k recovered in Q1). Slide 9: ROI ($149 billed at $450 = 3x markup, 0 malpractice exposure). Slide 10: CTA (book a 15-min partner demo, openpatent.ai/attorneys) + signature line. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {slides:[10 strings], signature:string}.
